name: memory-formation
description: Multi-turn conversations asserting appropriate memory formation by the assistant. Schema-correct and runnable when seeded data + creds available. The runner should drive each turn through ask-assistant, then snapshot assistant_memory rows for the test user and assert the expected memories formed (or didn't form).

cases.name: user_loves_gardening
cases.description: A clear, durable preference should be remembered.

turns.content: I spent the whole morning in my garden today, it was wonderful. I love being outside with my tulips.

cases.name: mundane_no_pollution
cases.description: Greetings and politeness should NOT pollute memory.

cases.name: factual_correction_high_importance
cases.description: An explicit correction should land as factual_correction with high importance and trigger a flag.

turns.content: Actually, my wife's name is Marcia, not Maria. Please remember that.

cases.name: repeated_question_recognised
cases.description: When the same question is asked across turns, the assistant should record it as a recurring_question.

turns.content: Still Tuesday — the same day we just spoke about.

cases.name: passing_emotion_short_lived
cases.description: Emotional state should be captured but with a 7-day expiry — short-lived.

turns.content: I'm feeling a bit lonely this afternoon. Just been a quiet day.
